[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up cartoon-style face with dark hair and a small mouth fills most of the frame, cropped tightly at the edges.

The main subject is a stylized anime-like character head shown from the front at a close angle, with light skin and simple line art features, including a small nose, a curved closed mouth, and partially visible eyes.

The setting is unclear because the image is an illustration with no real-world background, but a white background is visible around the character.

Visual Details:
The character has short, dark gray-to-black hair with layered strands and a thick outline; the hair forms curved shapes on both sides of the head. The eyes are not fully open; each eye appears as a dark, blocky shape with lighter highlights. The face is drawn with minimal shading, with a soft light tone across the cheeks and chin. The image is tightly cropped, cutting off some hair and the head edges near the borders. Lighting is flat and even, typical of digital line art.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a tightly cropped cartoon face with dark hair, simple line features, and closed-mouth expression. The background is plain white and the illustration fills the frame.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
